entities.name: State Machine
entities.context: Workflow framework with [M], [P], [R] states for managing intelligence block processing and deployment

entities.name: Manifest
entities.context: Document created at [M] state while blocks are being generated

entities.name: Communications Generator
entities.context: Processes communications when folder enters [P] state and B14 or B25 blocks exist

entities.name: Intelligence Blocks
entities.context: Content units being generated during the [M] state of the workflow

entities.name: B14
entities.context: Block identifier that triggers communications processing when present

entities.name: B25
entities.context: Block identifier that triggers communications processing when present

relationships.context: Manifest created when workflow enters [M] state
Blocks generated during [M] state before transitioning to [P]
Checks for B14 presence to determine if communications needed

[P] state triggers Communications Generator check before moving to [R]
